hero.sub: We find where repetitive work drains your team — recurring tasks, messages, approval chains — and wire it to automation you can measure.

proof.label: Outcomes we're wiring up
proof.note: Honest placeholders until client data lands.

listen.title: Analyze
listen.body: We map how your operation actually runs — every recurring task, message, and approval — not how an org chart says it does.

find.title: Identify
find.body: We locate where work leaks: the steps repeated by hand, the follow-ups that slip, the hours spent moving data between tools.

automate.title: Automate
automate.body: We wire those steps to automation that runs 7/24 inside Bunker OS — and hand you the numbers so you can measure the gain.

sectors.label: Sector solutions
sectors.title: One real automation. The outcome it drives.
sectors.sub: Pick a sector. Every example below is a single automation we ship — not a feature list.
sectors.note: Figures are projected targets, clearly marked, until live client data replaces them.

gyms.name: Gyms
gyms.body: When a member stops checking in for 14 days, Bunker OS opens a WhatsApp thread with a tailored offer and books the return session — no front-desk effort.

clinics.name: Clinics
clinics.body: Unconfirmed appointments get a two-step reminder, then auto-offer the slot to the waitlist if it stays open — the calendar fills itself.

ecommerce.name: E-commerce
ecommerce.body: A cart left for an hour triggers a conversation — not a coupon blast — that answers the real objection and routes payment links back in-thread.

realestate.name: Real estate
realestate.body: Every portal inquiry is qualified, matched to live listings, and offered a viewing slot before a competitor calls back — the agent only sees ready buyers.

bunker.label: Bunker OS
bunker.title: Where your automations live and run.
bunker.body: Every flow we ship runs inside one operating layer — observable, measurable, always on. You see what ran, what it saved, and what's next.

forum.label: Community
forum.title: We talk automation, together.
forum.sub: Founders and ops teams share real builds, the gains, and where they got stuck in the Kiwi community.
forum.note: Sample threads — the community opens soon.

one.title: Cut our WhatsApp approval chain from 2 days to 10 minutes

two.title: How we halved no-shows at the clinic

three.title: Building your first flow in Bunker OS

four.title: Which work is worth automating — and which isn't?

chat.label: Live demo
chat.title: Talk to a Kiwi assistant.
chat.sub: Real, streaming, multilingual — ask in Turkish, English, Arabic, German, or Spanish. It knows what we do and can route you to a call.
chat.greeting: Hi — I'm Kiwi's assistant. Tell me what your team does by hand most often, and I'll show you where automation fits.
chat.error: The assistant is offline right now. Add an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to bring it online.

suggestions.one: How would you automate a gym?

founder.title: 1:1 with the founder
founder.body: You work directly with the person who builds it. No account-manager relay.

always.title: 7/24 assistants
always.body: Your automations don't clock out. They run, watch, and escalate around the clock.

measured.title: Measured, not promised
measured.body: Every engagement ships with the numbers attached. You'll know exactly what it moved.
